description: Base reel spin — 5×3 grid, P99 ≤ 500ms, Wild substitution, payline evaluation
Spin returns FullSpinOutcome within 500ms (extraBet OFF, no FG)
Balance < baseBet → error, no request issued
Concurrent spin blocked (button locked, 409 on 2nd request)
Wild substitutes all symbols except SC
Cascade chain elimination + Lightning Mark generation + row expansion
Win → Lightning Mark generated, symbols eliminated, rows expand 3→4, paylines 25→33
rows = 6 (MAX_ROWS) — no further expansion, cascade continues
New Main Game spin resets Lightning Marks and rows to 3
3+ cascade steps — each CascadeStep records grid, wins, marks
Thunder Blessing Scatter — dual-hit symbol upgrade when marks present
SC lands on marked grid → first hit converts all marks to same premium symbol
RNG < 0.40 → second hit upgrades marked symbols one tier
SC + no Lightning Marks → no Thunder Blessing
Thunder Blessing → Cascade continues if new win
Coin Toss — rows=6 + cascade win → probability gate → FG entry
rows=6 + Cascade success → mgFgTriggerProb (0.009624) → coinProbs[0]=0.80 for Heads
Coin Toss Heads (main game) → FG starts at ×3
Coin Toss Tails → no FG, spin ends
Free Game — Lightning Marks persist cross-Spin, ×3→×7→×17→×27→×77 sequence
FG round 1 uses freeGame weights, inherits marks from main game, win × 3
2nd FG Coin Toss Heads → multiplier upgrades ×3→×7
Multiplier at ×77 with Heads → stays at ×77
Any FG Coin Toss Tails → FG ends, marks cleared
buyFG mode → exactly 5 FG rounds, multipliers [3,7,17,27,77]
FG Bonus multiplier drawn once (×1/×5/×20/×100) from fgBonus weights
×77 + Tails → FG ends immediately, marks cleared, totalWin returned
FG disconnection recovery — restore from Redis/PostgreSQL
FG in progress + valid JWT → backend restores FG state from Redis
FG state restored → frontend resumes from breakpoint
JWT expired on reconnect → 401, FG state preserved
